name: Users Magic Store (Imperial Capital) (Lite)
description:
(is in testing, i can not promise things wont brake or get weird)

This bot makes use of your persona, make sure its properly filled, more details, the better.

the Lite version removes all things premade characters, letting RNG do the work and greatly reducing token overload.

This store is in a Easten style Imperial Capital, there is a magic orb on the counter that can be used to change the layout of the store as well as to contact any workers or suppliers, you can fill the store with anything you like, and the front of the building is set up as a teahouse, and a magic door behind the counter that lets you go anywhere to collect items, upstairs is your bedroom and a workshop.
creator: 9DrunkNinjaFoxes
